overall.description: A cinematic night-time journey through a narrow futuristic urban canyon in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera glides smoothly forward between towering neon-lit skyscrapers, passing large digital advertisements and illuminated corporate towers while maintaining an elevated perspective above the street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit corridor between corporate towers

events.description: large illuminated digital billboard begins to enter view on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: gliding smoothly forward through the narrow urban canyon on an elevated pathway or transit line

entered.detail: tall building with horizontal orange and brown stripes and illuminated windows
dark glass facade building with grid-patterned illuminated windows
wet reflective street surface with distant vehicle lights visible below
cluster of bright lights visible at the end of the urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth forward glide through a narrow futuristic city canyon. The orange-striped tower dominates the right side while a dark glass building with grid windows lines the left. Below, a reflective wet street stretches into the distance toward a cluster of city lights. Around 15 seconds, a large digital billboard begins to appear on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate advertising corridor with prominent digital displays

events.description: digital billboard on left fully illuminates displaying vehicle advertisement with financing text
vertical advertisement banners on right building scroll to display new content

agents.ego_description: continuing forward passage alongside the large digital billboard, observing the scrolling advertisements on the right tower

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying car advertisements with promotional text and percentage rates
tall narrow advertisement panels mounted on the orange building displaying various products

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the section where the left digital billboard dominates the view, displaying bright vehicle advertisements. The orange tower on the right recedes to mid-distance while vertical ad banners scroll on its surface. The corridor remains tightly enclosed with the reflective street continuing below, and the camera maintains its smooth forward trajectory through the neon-lit canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon approaching distant city center

events.description: digital billboard exits frame left, revealing dark building facade again

agents.ego_description: moving past the billboard zone and continuing deeper into the narrow corridor toward the distant illuminated city center

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the large digital billboard passes out of view to the left, revealing the dark building facade once again. The orange tower returns to the near-right position as the camera continues its smooth descent toward the distant city lights. The corridor remains narrow and enclosed, with the reflective street below guiding the eye toward the illuminated horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a smooth forward glide through a narrow futuristic urban canyon that transitions from a stark architectural corridor into a vibrant neon-lit passage before returning to a dark, enclosed perspective. It begins between a dark glass building on the left and a dominant orange-striped tower on the right, with a reflective wet street stretching toward distant city lights below. As the camera advances, the view shifts to be dominated by a large, bright digital billboard displaying vehicle advertisements on the left, while vertical banners begin to scroll across the receding orange tower. The scene then opens back up as the billboard passes out of view, revealing the dark facade once again. Finally, the camera continues its steady descent, guided by the reflective street toward the illuminated horizon as the orange tower returns to the immediate right.
